chunks.text: Course: EE 97 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 97. Field Study Catalog Description: Students take part in organized individual field sponsored programs with off-campus companies or tutoring/mentoring relevant to specific aspects and applications of computer science on or off campus. Note Summer CPT or OPT students: written report required. Course does not count toward major requirements, but will be counted in the cumulative units toward graduation. Units: 1-4 Also Offered As: ELENG 97 Prerequisites: Consent of instructor (see department adviser). Formats: Summer: 2.5-10 hours of fieldwork per week Fall: 1-4 hours of fieldwork per week Spring: 1-4 hours of fieldwork per week Summer: 2-7.5 hours of fieldwork per week Grading Basis: Pass/Not Pass Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
